title: Reading and Use of English - Part 7
description: You are going to read an article about four people who discuss their interest in science. For questions 43–52, choose from the people (A–D). The people may be chosen more than once.

texts.A:
### Lucas, 30, Science Teacher
[43]I've always been fascinated by how things work.[/43] [44]As a child, I would take apart gadgets just to see inside.[/44] Now, I enjoy sharing my passion for science with my students. [45]It's rewarding to see them become curious about the world.[/45]
texts.B:
### Anna, 27, Researcher
[46]My job involves studying plants and their growth.[/46] [47]I love spending time in the lab, making new discoveries.[/47] [48]Sometimes, experiments don't go as planned, but that's part of science.[/48]
texts.C:
### Ben, 40, Engineer
[49]I use science every day to solve real-world problems.[/49] [50]Designing machines that help people is what motivates me.[/50] [51]I think science is essential for progress.[/51]
texts.D:
### Chloe, 18, Student
[52]I'm planning to study biology at university.[/52] [43]Watching documentaries about space and nature inspired me.[/43] [44]I hope to become a scientist one day.[/44]

questions.question: was inspired by documentaries about science?
questions.explanation: Chloe was inspired by documentaries about space and nature.

questions.question: used to take apart gadgets as a child?
questions.explanation: Lucas took apart gadgets as a child to see inside.

questions.question: finds it rewarding to inspire curiosity in others?
questions.explanation: Lucas enjoys seeing his students become curious about the world.

questions.question: studies plant growth professionally?
questions.explanation: Anna's job involves studying plants and their growth.

questions.question: enjoys making discoveries in the lab?
questions.explanation: Anna loves spending time in the lab making new discoveries.

questions.question: accepts that experiments sometimes fail?
questions.explanation: Anna says experiments don't always go as planned, but that's part of science.

questions.question: applies science to solve practical problems?
questions.explanation: Ben uses science every day to solve real-world problems.

questions.question: is motivated by designing helpful machines?
questions.explanation: Ben is motivated by designing machines that help people.

questions.question: believes science is vital for progress?
questions.explanation: Ben thinks science is essential for progress.

questions.question: plans to study biology at university?
questions.explanation: Chloe is planning to study biology at university.
